heading: Add an LDAP Database User or Group
body:
Atlas CLI

To create a database user for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas dbusers create [builtInRole]... [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas dbusers create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dbusers-create).

Atlas UI
